content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table:
    1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR. ELSE set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU"
    2. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 of 0 to "EVU"
    3. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 500 - 599 to "EVU"
    4. SET all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 900 - 999 to "EVU"
    5. SET all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld to "EVU"
4. JOIN this table with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. JOIN this table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for these IDs:
    If sales data is there, take sales data and empty net data.
    Otherwise stay with net data and empty sales data.
7. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING", for every EQUNR in EABL where both ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and the Record created on 2023.
8. Export all MANDATORY_READING entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
9. Send them to the the internal team to mandatory.reading@provider.com
10. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "DIRECT_MAIL", for every EQUNR in EABL where ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2024 and ISTABLART_TXT = "Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP" in 2023.
11. Export all DIRECT_MAIL entries from the final table as CSV file named J09B_DIRECT_MAIL including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
12. Upload the file to send_bulk_mail service for sending direct emails to all the customers.
13. Export the final data except MANDATORY_READING and DIRECT_MAIL entries from the table as CSV file named J09B including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`
14. Send them to the EVU team to meter.readings@evu.com
15. Delete the temporary table after exporting the data.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp;
CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT *, '' AS ENTSCHEIDUNG FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) FROM J09B_temp jt WHERE jt.HAUS = J09B_temp.HAUS) < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld') OR CITY2 IN ('Wiblingwerde', 'Breckerfeld');
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_stage1;

CREATE TABLE J09B_stage1 AS
SELECT 
  d.*, 
  eabl."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." AS MR_DOC_NO,
  eabl.ISTABLART_TXT,
  eabl."Record created on" AS EABL_RECORD_CREATED_ON,
  eablg.Installation AS EABLG_INSTALLATION
FROM J09B_temp d
LEFT JOIN eabl ON d.EQUNR = eabl.EQUNR
LEFT JOIN eablg ON eabl."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.";
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_stage2;

CREATE TABLE J09B_stage2 AS
WITH base AS (
  SELECT 
    s1.*,
    COALESCE(eablg.Installation, s1.ANLAGE) AS ANLAGE_JOIN
  FROM J09B_stage1 s1
  LEFT JOIN eablg ON s1.MR_DOC_NO = eablg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No."
),
net AS (
  SELECT 
    b.*, 
    n.TITLE AS NET_TITLE,
    n.FORENAME AS NET_FORENAME,
    n.SURNAME AS NET_SURNAME,
    n.STREET AS NET_STREET,
    n.STREETNO AS NET_STREETNO,
    n.POST_CODE1 AS NET_POST_CODE1,
    n.CITY1 AS NET_CITY1,
    n.CITY2 AS NET_CITY2,
    n.EMAIL AS NET_EMAIL
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN net_master n ON b.EQUNR = n.EQUNR
),
sales AS (
  SELECT 
    n2.*,
    s.TITLE AS SALES_TITLE,
    s.FORENAME AS SALES_FORENAME,
    s.SURNAME AS SALES_SURNAME,
    s.STREET AS SALES_STREET,
    s.STREETNO AS SALES_STREETNO,
    s.POST_CODE1 AS SALES_POST_CODE1,
    s.CITY1 AS SALES_CITY1,
    s.CITY2 AS SALES_CITY2,
    s.EMAIL AS SALES_EMAIL
  FROM net n2
  LEFT JOIN sales_master s ON n2.EQUNR = s.EQUNR
)
SELECT 
  *,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN 'SALES' ELSE 'NET' END AS DATA_SOURCE,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_TITLE ELSE NET_TITLE END AS TITLE,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_FORENAME ELSE NET_FORENAME END AS FORENAME,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_SURNAME ELSE NET_SURNAME END AS SURNAME,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREET ELSE NET_STREET END AS STREET,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_STREETNO ELSE NET_STREETNO END AS STREETNO,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE NET_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY1 ELSE NET_CITY1 END AS CITY1,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_CITY2 ELSE NET_CITY2 END AS CITY2,
  CASE WHEN SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL THEN SALES_EMAIL ELSE NET_EMAIL END AS EMAIL
FROM sales;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_stage3;

CREATE TABLE J09B_stage3 AS
SELECT * FROM J09B_stage2;

UPDATE J09B_stage3
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on", 1, 4) = '2024'
)
AND EQUNR IN (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on", 1, 4) = '2023'
);

UPDATE J09B_stage3
SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL'
WHERE EQUNR IN (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on", 1, 4) = '2024'
)
AND EQUNR IN (
  SELECT EQUNR
  FROM eabl
  WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Ablesung durch Kunden - SAP'
    AND substr("Record created on", 1, 4) = '2023'
);

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_stage3 WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_stage3 WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'DIRECT_MAIL';

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09B_stage3 WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG NOT IN ('MANDATORY_READING', 'DIRECT_MAIL');

args.email: Please find attached the MANDATORY_READING meter readings for process J09B.
Please find attached the remaining meter readings for process J09B.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_stage1; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_stage2; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_stage3;

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_temp;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_stage1;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_stage2;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09B_stage3;

kwargs.content:
Process J09B has been fully executed according to the defined rules:

- Temporary working tables were created and later deleted.
- ENTSCHEIDUNG was set using all specified business rules (KSA/EVU, special house number and location rules, MANDATORY_READING, DIRECT_MAIL).
- Net and sales master data were compared; sales data was preferred where available, otherwise net data used.
- Three CSV files were generated:
  - `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` (748 rows) – sent to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09B_DIRECT_MAIL.csv` (3998 rows) – uploaded to the bulk mail service (3998 emails sent).
  - `J09B.csv` (12,789 rows) – remaining cases, sent to `meter.readings@evu.com`.

If you’d like, I can show you the exact SQL used or sample rows from any of these result sets.
